prompt.name: Coherence Coach Track — S8.1 审计分级门禁 (Audit Gate)
prompt.sub_stage_name: 审计分级门禁 — Audit Health 评分 + P0/P1 聚合
prompt.role: 你是 Coherence Coach Track S8.1 实现者。 你的任务是：实现 src/coach/audit_health.py，为 gate 6 (audit_gate) 提供运行时 audit_health 指标——P0/P1 finding 聚合、审计健康评分、历史趋势追踪。
prompt.context:
gates.json 中 gate 6 定义： ```json "6_audit_gate": { "metric": "audit_health", "rule": "P0=0 且 P1 低于告警阈值" } ```
已有审计和数据源： - src/inner/audit/ — 底层审计模块（冻结，只读） - src/coach/mrt.py — Phase 7 MRT 实验记录 - src/coach/diagnostics.py — Phase 7 三诊断 - src/coach/gates_v18_7.py — Phase 7 四门禁 - reports/full_scan/ — S10-S90 白金审计报告（含 findings） - contracts/gates.json — 8 门禁定义（冻结，只读引用）
设计要点： - AuditHealthScorer 是只读评分器——聚合已有审计 finding，不修改审计流程 - P0 = 阻断性缺陷（安全违规、数据丢失、合约违反） - P1 = 非阻断性告警（性能退化、覆盖不足、配置偏差） - 历史趋势用简单滑动窗口（最近 N 次审计的 P0/P1 计数）
prompt.task: 1) 实现 src/coach/audit_health.py 2) 新增 tests/test_s8_audit_health.py 3) 追加 Phase 8 配置段到 config/coach_defaults.yaml 4) 不实现 window_gate、全链路测试、签收

implementation_steps.step:
在 config/coach_defaults.yaml 追加：
```yaml # ── Phase 8: 门禁闭环与系统签收 ────────────────── audit_health: enabled: false p1_threshold: 3 history_window: 10
window_consistency: enabled: false max_version_drift: 1 ```

```python """S8.1 审计分级门禁测试。""" import pytest from src.coach.audit_health import AuditFinding, AuditHealthScorer
class TestAuditFinding: def test_is_blocking(self): assert AuditFinding(severity="P0", category="security", detail="x").is_blocking() assert not AuditFinding(severity="P1", category="quality", detail="x").is_blocking()
def test_is_warning(self): assert AuditFinding(severity="P1", category="quality", detail="x").is_warning() assert not AuditFinding(severity="P2", category="info", detail="x").is_warning()
class TestAuditHealthScorer: def test_no_findings_perfect_score(self): scorer = AuditHealthScorer() result = scorer.evaluate([]) assert result.score == 1.0 assert result.p0_count == 0 assert result.p0_blocking is False
def test_p0_blocks_gate(self): scorer = AuditHealthScorer() findings = [AuditFinding("P0", "security", "SQL injection")] result = scorer.evaluate(findings) assert result.p0_blocking is True assert result.score < 0.5
def test_p1_under_threshold_ok(self): scorer = AuditHealthScorer(p1_threshold=3) findings = [AuditFinding("P1", "quality", "low coverage") for _ in range(2)] result = scorer.evaluate(findings) assert result.p0_blocking is False assert result.p1_above_threshold is False assert result.score >= 0.8
def test_p1_above_threshold_warns(self): scorer = AuditHealthScorer(p1_threshold=2) findings = [AuditFinding("P1", "quality", "low coverage") for _ in range(5)] result = scorer.evaluate(findings) assert result.p1_above_threshold is True assert 0.3 <= result.score < 0.8
def test_mixed_p0_p1(self): scorer = AuditHealthScorer() findings = [ AuditFinding("P0", "security", "breach"), AuditFinding("P1", "quality", "coverage"), AuditFinding("P1", "quality", "coverage"), ] result = scorer.evaluate(findings) assert result.p0_blocking is True assert result.p0_count == 1 assert result.p1_count == 2
def test_trend_tracking(self): scorer = AuditHealthScorer() scorer.evaluate([]) scorer.evaluate([]) trend = scorer.trend() assert len(trend["scores"]) == 2 assert trend["average"] == 1.0
def test_audit_health_output_format(self): scorer = AuditHealthScorer() result = scorer.evaluate([]) ah = result.audit_health() for key in ("audit_health_score", "p0_count", "p1_count", "p0_blocking", "gate_pass"): assert key in ah, f"Missing {key}" assert ah["gate_pass"] is True
def test_to_dict_serializable(self): scorer = AuditHealthScorer() result = scorer.evaluate([]) d = result.to_dict() assert "score" in d assert "p0_count" in d ```

prompt.success_criteria: 1. src/coach/audit_health.py 存在：AuditFinding/AuditHealthScore/AuditHealthScorer 2. P0=0,P1=0 → score=1.0, gate_pass=True 3. P0>0 → p0_blocking=True, score<0.5, gate_pass=False 4. P1≤threshold → p1_above_threshold=False, score≥0.8 5. P1>threshold → p1_above_threshold=True, 0.3≤score<0.8 6. audit_health() 输出 5 字段匹配 gate 6 需求 7. trend() 历史趋势追踪 8. to_dict() JSON 可序列化 9. 新增测试全部 pass + 1034 已有测试零回归 10. 不修改任何已冻结文件
